candidates.why: Only broad D&A label visible, but it is blank in the excerpt and not clearly tied specifically to the selected COGS bucket 'Material Expenses - Materials, Inventory, Own Work & Utility'. No separate COGS-specific D&A row is shown above the financial section.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicitly tied to SG&A, not COGS.
Explicitly tied to R&D, not COGS.

variables.notes: No explicit operating D&A row attributable to the selected COGS bucket is visible. Therefore COGS D&A is assumed embedded or unavailable for separate add-back, and no row should be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This is an explicit D&A component of 'Administration and sales expenses'. The parent row equals its balancing value plus this depreciation amount, so the selected XSGA parent already contains it; adding it separately would double count.

This is an explicit D&A component of 'Research and development expenses'. The selected XSGA bucket already includes the total R&D row, and XRD is also mapped to that same R&D row; under the stated R&D interaction rule, this R&D D&A should not be added separately.
Generic D&A row appears blank and is not needed because the visible bucket-specific D&A lines are already embedded in their selected parent rows.

variables.notes: Both visible SG&A-related D&A rows appear to be sub-components of already selected parent rows: 'Administration and sales expenses' = balancing value + SG&A depreciation, and 'Research and development expenses' = balancing value + R&D depreciation. Adding either separately would double count. The separate R&D row is also already handled through both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so R&D D&A should not be added separately.
